lines.speaker: Adventurer Ada
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Adventurer Ada
lines.text: Ada! Nice to meet you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you waiting here for?

lines.speaker: Adventurer Ada
lines.text: I'm looking for an adventure! This place is meant to be the perfect place to find one for a budding pirate like me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Pirate?

lines.speaker: Adventurer Ada
lines.text: Well... the good kind!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Well, I've never really had to look for an adventure myself. Personally I find I just stumble into them instead.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Ada
lines.text: Really? Well, I hope that happens to me soon!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure it will. Good luck!

lines.speaker: Adventurer Ada
lines.text: Really? Well, perhaps I'd be better off sticking with you then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, but I'm still pretty new to it all. I don't think I'm ready to be hiring a crew yet, but I'll let you know when I am.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Ada
lines.text: Oh, fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd definitely be happy to have you on my crew.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Ada
lines.text: Hang on... You don't actually look like much of an adventurer to me. I don't think this will work.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Ada
lines.text: Great! I reckon this will be a fun adventure! I'll see you on your boat...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, but I'm not really in a place for you to join me right now.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Ada
lines.text: Oh, fair enough.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Ada
lines.text: Hello again! Reckon you're ready for me to join you yet?

sections.title: When at the Pandemonium after joining crew

lines.speaker: Adventurer Ada
lines.text: Captain!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there. How are you enjoying being part of the crew?

lines.speaker: Adventurer Ada
lines.text: I'm looking forward to the next adventure! I might start writing down what we get up to.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, that might save me a bit of time on my captain's log.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Ada
lines.text: Great!
